testcase.name: test_old_creds_fail
testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_profile_branding.py:77: in test_old_creds_fail assert r.status_code == 401 E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_change_and_verify_flow
testcase.failure: tests/test_auth_profile_branding.py:120: in test_change_and_verify_flow assert r_rev.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_delete_requires_auth
testcase.error: tests/test_delete_and_branding.py:22: in session assert r.status_code == 200, f"login failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: login failed: 401 {"detail":"Invalid email or password"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code

testcase.error: tests/test_delete_and_branding.py:22: in session assert r.status_code == 200, f"login failed: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: login failed: 401 {"detail":"Invalid email or password"} E assert 401 == 200 E + where 401 = <Response [401]>.status_code
